core_mechanism: Landau-type effective-potential analysis: reconstructing a free-energy-like effective potential as a function of a scalar order parameter and reading the shape of its minima (single well versus a double-well / discontinuous jump) to classify the order of a phase transition and locate the critical endpoint of a first-order line in a control-parameter plane
brief_reason: The method probes the nature of the transition by investigating an effective potential as a function of the average plaquette (an order parameter) to detect where a first-order transition line appears as control parameters (temperature and density) are varied.
